mano_cua.result_summary: 移动端菜单打开时页面 body 可滚动，scroll lock 未生效。document.body.style.overflow 为空，getComputedStyle(document.body).overflow 返回 'auto scroll'，window.scrollTo(0,200) 在菜单打开状态下成功滚动页面到 y=200
mano_cua.last_reasoning: The screenshot confirms the findings. The console clearly shows: 1. document.body.style.overflow → '' (empty - no inline style set to prevent scrolling) 2. getComputedStyle(document.body).overflow → 'auto scroll' (body can scroll) 3. window.scrollY → 0 (initial position) 4. window.scrollTo(0, 200); window.scrollY → 200 (body successfully scrolled to 200px even while mobile menu is open!)
